title: hieracium alatum subsp. cupulatum
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. cupulatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues due to its flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones content. Herbal preparations of Hieracium alatum subsp. cupulatum include infusions and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
